message: Pin to v0.55.4: pull v0.56.1-v0.58.0 due to Dolt server data-loss bugs (GH#2372, GH#2363)

files.patch:
@@ -1,25 +1,26 @@
 # typed: false
 # frozen_string_literal: true
 
-# This file was generated by GoReleaser. DO NOT EDIT.
+# Pinned to v0.55.4 (stable) — v0.56.1-v0.58.0 pulled due to Dolt server
+# data-loss bugs. See https://github.com/steveyegge/beads/issues/2372
 class Bd < Formula
   desc "AI-supervised issue tracker for coding workflows"
   homepage "https://github.com/steveyegge/beads"
-  version "0.58.0"
+  version "0.55.4"
   license "MIT"
 
   on_macos do
     if Hardware::CPU.intel?
-      url "https://github.com/steveyegge/beads/releases/download/v0.58.0/beads_0.58.0_darwin_amd64.tar.gz"
-      sha256 "bc06bb3f91c1e79c9d37ca910bf2ba33dff7736642b8098b8d1f87d114b634bb"
+      url "https://github.com/steveyegge/beads/releases/download/v0.55.4/beads_0.55.4_darwin_amd64.tar.gz"
+      sha256 "39a371688b4e622e14eb5bc84f54f90ed7a9a2faac57861156811af4693f8284"
 
       define_method(:install) do
         bin.install "bd"
       end
     end
     if Hardware::CPU.arm?
-      url "https://github.com/steveyegge/beads/releases/download/v0.58.0/beads_0.58.0_darwin_arm64.tar.gz"
-      sha256 "4dc3c9abb285ca5b28cf577eb452304b81eb003f8a67a377dbe1c8cf7e41a64c"
+      url "https://github.com/steveyegge/beads/releases/download/v0.55.4/beads_0.55.4_darwin_arm64.tar.gz"
+      sha256 "18afdf4f562323a71687b2f7ed95c27750aee8d361b176a4a79caf176f00c0b9"
 
       define_method(:install) do
         bin.install "bd"
@@ -29,15 +30,15 @@ class Bd < Formula
 
   on_linux do
     if Hardware::CPU.intel? && Hardware::CPU.is_64_bit?
